meaning: Printer Control Language,打印机控制语言
examples: PCL: How can I update the normals's cloud in PCL: : visualizer?
The hemagglutinating activity of PCL did not show blood donor and blood type specificity.
Conclusion PCL possesses good biocompatibility and high bone inductive potentiality, it can be used to repair bone defect.
As time passes, PCL degrades and is excreted out of the body, hopefully leaving behind a healed organ.
When a splint is created using PCL, it becomes a sort of biological placeholder, propping up structures while the body heals around it.
